name: urllib3-secure-extra

metadata.name: urllib3-secure-extra
metadata.summary: Marker library to detect whether urllib3 was installed with the deprecated [secure] extra

documentation:
# urllib3-secure-extra

Marker library to detect whether urllib3 was installed with the deprecated `[secure]` extra.

Read the [issue on the urllib3 repository](https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/issues/2680) for more information.

modules.name: urllib3_secure_extra
documentation: Marker library to detect whether urllib3 was installed with the deprecated [secure] extra.
